sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45225" key="eu)su/ndetos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐσύν-δετος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n45225.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">readily combining</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὰ φῶτα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope> </bibl>).<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">119</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
